slots.product_hypothesis: Stress self-test 30: B2B HVAC service callout acquisition for London facilities
slots.raw_idea: Stress self-test 30: B2B HVAC service callout acquisition for London facilities

execution.acquisition_channel: Acquisition channel: direct outbound to a named list (30–50 accounts) using one message template and one follow-up; measure replies-to-meeting, not sends. No automation spend until ten manual conversations complete.
execution.channel: Acquisition channel: direct outbound to a named list (30–50 accounts) using one message template and one follow-up; measure replies-to-meeting, not sends. No automation spend until ten manual conversations complete.
execution.demand_test: Demand test (24–48h): five structured discovery calls with buyers who match the ICP sketch. Success is not enthusiasm — it is willingness to name price sensitivity and next step. If zero commit to a follow-up concrete step, pause the concept.
execution_checklist: Collect three comparable supplier quotes with MOQ and lead time.
Confirm incoterms, duties, and VAT treatment for UK/EU.
Publish returns and warranty policy before first sale.
Run packaging drop-test and label compliance review.
execution.first_money: First money: do not invoice on the current framing. If you must test, cap at symbolic deposits only after a written scope change; otherwise redeploy calendar time to a narrower offer that clears the gates in a fresh run.
next_best_actions: Execute today: Find 3 to 5 vetted manufacturers or wholesalers for: Stress self-test 30: B2B HVAC service callout acquisition for London facilit…
Stand up one landing or Notion page with «StrSel Hvac: Calm, precise uk eu compliance first wedge for teams that care about outcomes.» and a single revenue CTA priced in GBP once your floor is set.
Run 3 live buyer touches (call, DM, or meeting) referencing «uk eu compliance first wedge»; end each with an ask that can produce cash or a signed next step.
execution.offer: Offer (validation-only, not for public sale until reframed): a 30-minute structured diagnostic on «Stress self-test 30: B2B HVAC service callout acquisition for London facilities» that ends with a written pass/fail on economics — used only to disprove or reshape the wedge, not to scale revenue.
optimisation_notes: Reduce part count and packaging cost only if quality floor preserved.
Prefer suppliers with audit trail and invoicing suitable for tax reporting.
execution.price: Publish a single scoped pilot or diagnostic in the £49–£249 range for a defined outcome and timebox; revise after three paying or deposit-backed conversations. Model posture: tiered subscription or usage aligned to value metric. No scale until margin is written down.
execution.product_focus: Stress self-test 30: B2B HVAC service callout acquisition for London facilities
